title: buchholzia tholloniana
intro: Buchholzia tholloniana, also known as the African medinilla or Buchholzia, is a plant species belonging to the Capparaceae family. It is widely used in traditional medicine, particularly in West Africa, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Buchholzia tholloniana include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a diuretic. Buchholzia tholloniana can be prepared as a herbal remedy by boiling its roots and leaves in water to create a tea or infusion.
